frontmatter.title: mcp-servers — MCP 官方参考实现集合
frontmatter.description: Anthropic 官方维护的 MCP 参考实现集合（7 个 small server）
frontmatter.tier_group: MCP 生态 + 同类工具

cross_check_anchors.verbatim: The servers in this repository are intended as **reference implementations** to demonstrate MCP features and SDK usage. They are meant to serve as educational examples for developers building their own MCP servers, not as production-ready solutions.

**[Everything](src/everything)** - Reference / test server with prompts, resources, and tools.
**[Fetch](src/fetch)** - Web content fetching and conversion for efficient LLM usage.
**[Filesystem](src/filesystem)** - Secure file operations with configurable access controls.
**[Git](src/git)** - Tools to read, search, and manipulate Git repositories.
**[Memory](src/memory)** - Knowledge graph-based persistent memory system.
**[Sequential Thinking](src/sequentialthinking)** - Dynamic and reflective problem-solving through thought sequences.
**[Time](src/time)** - Time and timezone conversion capabilities.

For example, this will start the [Memory](src/memory) server:
npx -y @modelcontextprotocol/server-memory
... uvx mcp-server-git / pip install mcp-server-git / python -m mcp_server_git
This project is licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 for new contributions, with existing code under MIT - see the [LICENSE](LICENSE) file for details.

| `read_text_file` | `true` | – | – | Pure read |
| `write_file` | `false` | `true` | `true` | Overwrites existing files |
| `move_file` | `false` | `false` | `true` | Deletes source file |
> Note: `idempotentHint` and `destructiveHint` are meaningful only when `readOnlyHint` is `false`, as defined by the MCP spec.

audience_judgment_basis: cs_background=yes 因 README/CLAUDE.md 全程使用 JSON config、TypeScript/Python 代码与 zod/pyright 概念，读者需会读 JSON / TS / Py；devops=mid 因 filesystem server 提供 Docker 部署示例（bind mount、npx -y、uvx），也涉及 OAuth-style env（GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN），但非复杂 K8s 编排；cc_experience=used 因重点是「mcpServers 字段怎么写」「command+args 是什么」，已默认读者会装 CC / 编辑 mcp.json，但没假设读者写 server。
fetched_via_log: cache miss → git clone --depth=1 via HTTP/1.1 → 抽出 README/CLAUDE.md/LICENSE 到 batch3；无 fallback。
